features: Perfect Fit for Fiat Punto & Linea Models: Specifically designed for Fiat Punto (2010–2016) and Linea (2012–2015), this Android car stereo features a 6.2-inch full-touch HD screen (1024x600 resolution) with 1080P support, quad-core processor, 2GB RAM, and 64GB ROM. The plug-and-play design integrates seamlessly with your vehicle’s dashboard, while USB input ensures easy media access.

Wireless CarPlay & Android Auto Integration: Stay connected on the road with wireless CarPlay and Android Auto—pair via Bluetooth or USB to access maps (Google Maps/Waze), hands-free calls, music, and messages. Voice control (Siri/Google Assistant) keeps your focus on driving, while the responsive touchscreen lets you navigate apps effortlessly.

GPS Navigation & WiFi Connectivity: Built-in WiFi hotspot support allows app downloads from the Goo-gle Play Store, while the offline GPS navigation system lets you pre-download maps via the "Here We Go" app for reliable routing without data. Use online maps like Goo-gle Maps for real-time traffic updates, perfect for UK road trips or daily commutes.

Split Screen & Mirror Link for Multi-Tasking: The split screen function lets you navigate and listen to music or radio simultaneously, enhancing convenience during long drives. Mirror Link syncs your smartphone screen (Android/iOS) to the car display via USB/WiFi—Android users enjoy two-way control, while iOS offers seamless one-way mirroring for maps or videos.

Bluetooth Calling, FM RDS Radio & Rear Camera: Bluetooth 5.0 Hands-free calls with an external microphone for clear audio, plus contact sync and wireless music streaming. FM RDS Radio: Auto-search/preset stations for news, traffic, and weather updates.Steering Wheel Control: Safe, distraction-free operation for volume, tracks, and calls. HD Rear Camera Included: Waterproof night-vision camera auto-switches to reversing view, aiding parking in low light—fits most UK license plates.
